Spiny Dirt Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Silent Stone
Turns the enemy with the highest spell power into a magic stone for 3 sec and deals 250000 magic damage. While the unit is turned to stone, they can't move and take 25% more damage. All enemies in a small radius around the magic stone can't use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped) for 3 sec and take 200000 magic damage. Also, all enemies in a large radius around the magic stone lose their balance. They can't dodge or deliver critical attacks for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚

First trigger: Once in a while
